purpose: Revised first portrait test after the 5x4 sheet looked too plain and repetitive. This 4x3 batch improves crop safety, face quality, order mapping, profession variety, and character appeal.
cropNamingRules: Crop by row/column/cropCell from this JSON, not by visual guessing.
Name each cropped file exactly as outputFile.
The first image is row 1 column 1; the last image is row 3 column 4.
If a portrait crosses a cell boundary, reject the sheet instead of naming by guess.
sheetPrompt: Create one full medieval fantasy character portrait sprite sheet using this JSON only. Layout exactly 4 columns x 3 rows, 12 portraits total, target 4096x3072 if possible, each portrait centered inside a 1024x1024 invisible crop cell. Fill cells left-to-right by row, top-to-bottom, matching the order field exactly. Solid pure green background #00FF00. No text, labels, names, numbers, UI frames, borders, grid lines, or watermarks. Every portrait must stay fully inside its own cell with generous padding around head, hair, hats, shoulders, hands, and props. Characters must look beautiful, entertaining, memorable, varied, and profession-specific. Repeated expressions of the same character must look like the same person with only expression/acting changed.
sharedStyle: beautiful and entertaining stylized medieval fantasy merchant RPG portrait, polished painterly-cartoon PC game UI art, premium collectible NPC portrait, charming expressive face, clear silhouette, bust portrait from chest up, three-quarter view, warm painterly lighting, crisp clean edges, vibrant profession-specific clothing accents, playful memorable details, simple pure green background #00FF00 for cropping, centered inside one invisible square crop cell, generous padding around head shoulders hair hands and props
